title: South Korea bets $540bn on a southwest chip hub the grid cannot yet feed
summary: What comes next, in the country’s next basic power plan and in the dam and grid approvals behind it, will decide whether the southwest becomes Korea’s new silicon heartland or a lesson in building faster than the land can carry.
